description_long: This car store is a modern, rectangular commercial building with a flat, tan roof and a combination of solid and glass exterior walls. The front facade features a prominent glass showroom section, allowing clear visibility of vehicles displayed inside and outside. The main entrance is sheltered by a canopy, and the building is surrounded by a paved area with parked cars and landscaped trees. The side and rear elevations are more utilitarian, with minimal windows and a service area visible. The structure is primarily constructed from concrete or masonry, with large glass panels and metal framing accentuating the showroom. The overall design is clean and functional, emphasizing vehicle display and customer accessibility.
description: A modern car store with a flat roof, large glass showroom, and parked cars in front, surrounded by trees and paved areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main glass showroom, entrance canopy, and two cars parked in front.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the glass showroom, entrance, and landscaped trees along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a service area, minimal windows, and a fenced section with trees.
description_view_3: Side view with tall windows and the glass showroom extending from the main building.
attribute_displayed_cars: Three cars visible: one white pickup truck, one yellow sedan, and one silver sedan, all parked in front of the showroom.
attribute_glass_facade: Yes, the building features a large glass facade on the front showroom section with full-height panels framed in metal.
